general_notes: 1. CONTRACTOR TO PROVIDE GLAZING TYPE AS REQUIRED TO MEET CODE. IF A DISCREPENCY ARISES, ARCHITECT IS TO BE NOTIFIED.
2. REFER TO SPECIFICATIONS FOR DETAILED INFORMATION.
3. FOR EXTERIOR WINDOWS PROVIDE EXTREIOR GLAZING TO MEET SHGC OF 0.25 OR LESS.
4. FOR EXTERIOR DOORS WITH GLAZING PROVIDE EXTERIOR GLAZING TO MEET SHGC OF 0.40 OR LESS.
5. PROVIDE FIRE RATED GLAZING FOR DOORS AND WINDOWS IN FIRE RATED WALLS.
6. BASIS OF DESIGN FOR GLAZING TYPE GL6: VITRO SOLARBAN 90 (2) SOLARGRAY + CLEAR
PANEL "A" WILL ALWAYS BE FROM RIGHT HINGE SWINGING OUTWARD, & THE LARGEST PANEL ON AN UNEVEN DESIGN.
ON SLIDING/AUTOMATIC DOORS PANEL "A" WILL ALWAYS BE THE SLIDER, & PANEL "B" WILL ALWAYS BE THE FIX PANEL.
2. ENTRANCE DOORS (KAWNEER MEDIUM STILE STANDARD DOOR W/ SOLARBAN 90 SOLAR CONTROL, CLEAR LOW-E)
3. COMMERCIAL GLAZED SWINGING ENTRANCE DOORS (KAWNEER MEDIUM STILE STANDARD DOOR)
4. ALL SOURCES OF AIR LEAKAGE IN BUILDING THERMAL ENVELOPE ARE TO BE SEALED W/ MOISTURE VAPOR-PERMEABLE MATERIAL.
keying_notes: EK EXTERIOR KEY ONLY - NO HANDLE
N1 REQUIRED CARD OR KEY TO LOCK/UNLOCK. OWNER TO USE ACCESS CONTROL SYSTEM TO SET DOOR TO STAY UNLOCKED DURING CERTAIN TIMES/EVENTS

legend.STRG: STILE AND RAIL; HALF GLASS / HALF RAISED PANEL
legend.IC: INTERIOR TO FRONT DESK W/ REMOTE DOOR UNLOCK
legend.MHO: MAGNETIC HOLD OPEN. PROVIDE ELECTICAL & CONNECT FOR FIRE ALARM ACTIVATION TO RELEASE HOLD OPEN
legend.N1: REQUIRED CARD OR KEY TO LOCK/UNLOCK. OWNER TO USE ACCESS CONTROL SYSTEM TO SET DOOR TO STAY UNLOCKED DURING CERTAIN TIMES/EVENTS
legend.WS: WOOD SLATS ON FACE OF DOOR
legend.X: AUTOMATIC FIRE DOOR/PARTITION; HARDWARE BY MANUFACTURER
legend.XX2: ATTACHED TO WALL ASSEMBLY, PER MFR
legend.XX3: MASONRY FRAME WITH THICKENED HEADER, PER MFR
legend.XXX:#A: SERIES FOR SUBTYPES FOR LITE DIMENSIONS
legend.XXX:A: FG 1x5 TRUE DIVIDED LITES @ 6'-8" OR 7'-0" DOORS
legend.XXX:B: FG 1x6 TRUE DIVIDED LITES @ 8'-0" OR TALLER DOORS (TYP)
legend.XXX:E: DOUBLE DOOR WITH CENTER MULLION AT STRIKE

project_risks.issue: 4 hardware set(s) referenced by 9 door(s) have no extracted line items.
project_risks.recommendation: Locate full hardware set definitions; carry as allowance until confirmed.

project_risks.issue: 9 opening(s) involve electrified or access-control hardware.
project_risks.recommendation: Confirm Div 08 / 26 / 27 / 28 scope split before bidding.

rfi_log.question: Provide the complete line-item list for hardware set(s): C201, C205, C710AM, C714AM.

For electrified openings (105, 106B, 200A, 200B, 201, 208, 209A, 209B, ...+1 more), confirm responsibility for 120 V power, low-voltage cabling, readers/head-end, fire alarm release, commissioning and programming.
rfi_log.recommendation: Carry Div 8 components only unless explicitly included.
rfi_log.reason: Carry Div 8 components only unless explicitly included.

estimator_notes: Keying notes captured from the drawings (2 line(s)); verify keyway, master structure, cylinder format and key counts.
43 opening(s) extracted from the schedule. Verify all marks against the source PDF before submitting bid.
21 hardware set(s) identified; 17 have a complete extracted item list.
13 general note(s) captured from the door-schedule sheet.

supply_only_notes: Submittal package: door, frame and hardware schedules with manufacturer cut sheets, keying schedule, electrified hardware riser, anchor templates.
installation_only_notes: Field-measure all openings before fabrication release. Verify rough-opening size, frame anchor type, and floor condition.
Storage and protection of doors / frames / hardware on site is by GC unless otherwise noted.
exclusions_to_consider: Exclude 120 V power, low-voltage cabling, access-control head-end, intrusion detection programming, fire-alarm tie-in (NIC).
Exclude permits, demolition, painting, drywall patching at frame anchors, floor preparation at thresholds.
coordination_items: Coordinate electrified hardware split: Div 08 hardware / Div 26 power / Div 27-28 low-voltage + head-end.
Attend pre-installation meeting with GC, EC, low-voltage, fire alarm and security trades.
Hold formal keying meeting with owner before cylinder fabrication.
